data_type_evidence: h-e1-v2/code/data_collection.py:24-34 loads the real `open-llm-leaderboard/contents` dataset via `datasets.load_dataset(config.LEADERBOARD_DATASET, split="train")` and converts it to a pandas DataFrame.

h-e1-v2/code/data_collection.py:125-191 retrieves real Hugging Face model cards and model metadata via `ModelCard.load` and `HfApi.model_info`; no synthetic generators or mock datasets appear in the live pipeline.

h-e1-v2/code/experiment.log:64-130 records an actual run that loaded 4,576 leaderboard rows, retrieved 3,749 model cards, exported `h-e1-v2/data/registry.csv`, saved `summary_stats.json`, and generated figures.
h-e1-v2/experiment_results.json:2-35 marks the pipeline `status` as `completed` with `pipeline_version` `h-e1-v2`, `n_analyzable` 4493, and `total_retrieved` 3749.
